violations.text: A chemical spray bottle was observed hanging on the splash guard of the handwashing sink in the kitchen. PIC removed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (stand beverage blender, can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC stated blender is not used and was taken permanently out of service. Can opener taken to be cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026

The following were observed held at or above 46 degrees Fahrenheit: -cream (server low boy, 46-47) -chopped tomato (garnish tray, 54) -tomato broth (on ice, 54) -cheese (reach-in, 45). Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Cream was disposed, beverages with temperature 43 degrees or below were moved to other units. Ice slurry was added to garnish tray; ice was added to container with tomato broth. Foods were re-arranged in reach-in to facilitate air flow. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026

Orange juice packaged in the food establishment are lacking proper labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Juice was removed from self-service; label guidance provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026

Multiple foods and beverages (flours, rice, beverages) were observed stored on the floor in the storage room, unused bar area, and under service counter. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. PIC has storage containers on order. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2026
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Utensils were cleaned and sanitized, hot water was refilled. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026
Containers of single service items were observed stored on the floor in the unused bar room. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -blender bases -table-top hot hold unit -low boy tabletop (bar) -can opener base. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2026
An air gap is missing at the prep sink. Inspector observed an air break. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/23/2026
Ice machine is lacking an air gap. New Violation. Correct By: 03/23/2026

The drain plug for the outside dumpster is missing. Drains in receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must have drain plugs in place. New Violation. Correct By: 03/23/2026
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. New Violation. Correct By: 03/23/2026
